content:
From: Tobias Nipkow <nipkow@in.tum.de>
Subject: [isabelle] Nominations for the AMS Milestone Prize in Formal Verification

Hi,

https://www.ams.org/prizes-awards/paview.cgi?parent_id=63

I would like to advertise this new AMS prize in formalization. The deadline is
coming up really soon (June 30). I believe that this is the first time the
prize is offered.

Best,
Tobias
